title: eulophia grantii
intro: Eulophia grantii, also known as the "Grant's orchid", is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. Eulophia grantii is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, inflammation, and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant is often prepared as an herbal remedy by decocting the roots or using the leaves to make teas or infusions.
